title: What's new in version 3.4.1?
summary: New in-app notification feature. Stay up to date with the latest developments!
messagePart1: Murmur Master® is proud to announce a new in-app notification feature! New notifications will appear in the update section on the top left hand corner of the screen.
messagePart2: Stay up to date with all the latest in Cardiology and new Murmur Master® features. We've got some great features coming coming out in the next few months. Also be sure to check out our new YouTube channel, which has incredible high-yield material!

title: Incredible new murmur
summary: Have you ever heard a ball and cage (Starr Edwards) valve replacement?
messagePart1: Have you ever heard a Starr Edwards (Ball and cage) valve replacement? These are older valve replacements, which have been superseded by newer models, such as the bileaflet valve. They have a unique sound profile. Check out this case to learn more!

title: New YT video
messagePart1: New aortic regurgitation (insufficiency) video. Are you a visual learner? This video provides a great summary on aortic regurgitation to help you learn fast!

title: Test your skills!
summary: Have you got what it takes to crack this case?
messagePart1: A 38-year old gentleman presents to the emergency department with 3 hours of chest pain. A language barrier prevents initial assessment of the nature of the pain. His ECG has been highlighted as showing a potential ST-elevation myocardial infarction. What do you think the diagnosis is? Check out his auscultation findings now!

title: New YouTube video
messagePart1: Check out this great summary on atrial fibrillation (AF). A high-yield overview on AF, which is the commonest sustained arrhythmia. Part 1 covers: what AF is, how to recognise it, what causes it and what the symptoms and complications are!

title: Happy new year and festive video!
messagePart1: Happy new year from Murmur Master! Check out this festive new YouTube video: the holiday heart syndrome - relevant for the time of year!

title: New exam-focussed video
messagePart1: Check out Murmur Master's latest YouTube video. It's an exam focussed murmur summary to help you rapidly up-skill as we enter exam season! Hope you enjoy and best of luck!

title: What's new in version 4.0.2?
messagePart1: We're delighted to bring you the latest update from Murmur Master® - a dedicated section for lung sounds and respiratory auscultation. All included with Murmur Master® Pro membership!
messagePart2: Access a huge range of respiratory lesions, high-fidelity lung sounds recorded from real patients and stunning animations and respiratory phonograms, to help you become a pro at respiratory auscultation as well! We'd also be delighted to hear your thoughts and feedback!

title: What's new in version 4.0.2?
summary: Lung sounds and more, included in your plan!
messagePart1: As a valued user of Murmur Master® Pro, we're delighted to bring you our latest update - a dedicated section for lung sounds and respiratory auscultation. All included with your Murmur Master® Pro membership!
messagePart2: Access a huge range of respiratory lesions, high-fidelity lung sounds recorded from real patients and stunning animations and respiratory phonograms, to help you become a pro at respiratory auscultation as well! We're bringing this to you as included within your membership plan, to say thank you for your support in the early days! In return, we wonder whether you could do us a favour - if you found Murmur Master® useful, give us a rating on the App store and recommend to a friend who you think could also benefit!

title: Are you enjoying Murmur Master?
summary: Could you provide a quick rating (takes 5 seconds)
messagePart1: Murmur Master has helped 1000s learning heart and lung sounds but we continually strive to make it better.
messagePart2: We'd really appreciate 5 seconds of your time to review Murmur Master to help us improve! Thanks so much in advance

title: Test Android v 1.0.3?
summary: Test for android in-app notification feature. Stay up to date with the latest developments!
messagePart1: Murmur Master® is proud to announce a new in-app notification feature! New notifications will appear in the update section on the top left hand corner of the screen.
messagePart2: Should go to pericardial friction rub
